title: ジャパンカップの後に・“皇帝”推参

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio does a splendid job winning the Japan
Cup, a race filled with some of the toughest
competitors around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, she heads to the student council
office to meet with Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After she arrives, Symboli Rudolf tells her that she
desires to race with the Monarch Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The showdown shall be at the biggest race of
them all, the Arima Kinen! Teio's most longed-for
match is about to become a reality!
